title: Quark flavour mixing (CKM matrix)
statement: The CKM mixing angles and the CP-violating phase emerge from the misalignment of the up- and down-type Yukawa structures in the TECT vacuum.
scope: OPEN scaffold. Quark mixing matrix and CP phase (pillar P6; GAP-3). Depends on the Yukawa structures (E4).
falsifier: A derived CKM angle or phase incompatible with measurement after input freeze (GAP-3).
no_overclaim: CKM is not derived; the Yukawa-misalignment mechanism is the target.
next_action: Compute the up/down Yukawa eigenbasis misalignment and extract $V_{\rm CKM}$; test the Wolfenstein hierarchy.
